## Definition

Estimated total resident population of the state in Lakhs (1 Lakh = 100,000). Inter-censal estimates from MoSPI; the next decadal Census will reset the baseline.

## Coverage

- **Temporal**: 2015-04..2025-04 (11 periods)
- **Spatial**: All-India aggregate; 28 states; 8 UTs (37 entities)
- **Rows on disk**: 407

## Methodology vintage

NITI Aayog ICED state-wise deep-dive API; payload fetched 2026-05-14T07:51:49Z; 11 fiscal years, 407 rows.

## Notes

Source: NITI Aayog ICED dashboard, row 'Population'. The values are inter-censal estimates — treat the per-year deltas as projections, not measured changes. The most recent Census of India was 2011; the 2021 round was deferred.
